methodology: Popularity is a transparent proxy based on current Nigerian supermarket and store presence, recurrence across Shoprite, Addide, Prince Ebeano, and SPAR listings, brand familiarity, pack-size breadth, and importance to a typical supermarket category.
attribution: Product names and pack facts are source-referenced. Descriptions are original summaries. Barcodes are optional and are included only when separately verified; no barcode is inferred from a retailer SKU.

packs.name: Mini Market 400
packs.description: A staged Nigerian essentials catalogue with reviewed products sourced across current Nigerian supermarkets while research continues toward 400 products.

packs.name: Supermarket 1,000
packs.description: Broader brand, pack-size, household, personal-care, and regional coverage.

packs.name: Supermarket 2,000
packs.description: The full staged catalogue with deeper category and variation coverage.
